headline: 5 core Solana programs catalogued: DLMM, DAMM v2, DAMM v1, DBC, Farming. Audited by Zellic, Bramah Systems, and Neodyme.

findings.text: DLMM program (LBUZKhRxPF3XUpBCjp4YzTKgLccjZhTSDM9YuVaPwxo) catalogued from official docs.
Official deployments doc at docs.meteora.ag/developer-guide lists all program IDs with network coverage.
Audits by Zellic and Bramah Systems for DLMM; Neodyme for Dynamic AMM and Vault contracts per Solana Compass.
GitHub MeteoraAg organization verified with canonical repos: dlmm-sdk, damm-v2, damm-v2-sdk, dynamic-bonding-curve.
Solana mainnet only; no cross-chain deployments identified.
5 core programs: DLMM (program), DAMM v2 (program), DAMM v1 (program), DBC (program), Farming (reward program).

rationale.verdict: Discovery phase — 5 Solana program addresses and supporting infrastructure catalogued via official developer documentation, GitHub repositories, and audit disclosures.

evidence.shows: DLMM program ID on mainnet: LBUZKhRxPF3XUpBCjp4YzTKgLccjZhTSDM9YuVaPwxo; same ID on devnet.
DAMM v2 program ID: cpamdpZCGKUy5JxQXB4dcpGPiikHawvSWAd6mEn1sGG; Pool Authority: HLnpSz9h2S4hiLQ43rnSD9XkcUThA7B8hQMKmDaiTLcC
DAMM v1 program ID: Eo7WjKq67rjJQSZxS6z3YkapzY3eMj6Xy8X5EQVn5UaB; Farming program: FarmuwXPWXvefWUeqFAa5w6rifLkq5X6E8bimYvrhCB1
Official Meteora GitHub organization with verified domain meteora.ag; repositories for DLMM SDK, DAMM v2, DBC, farming, and supporting SDKs.
Meteora DLMM audited by Zellic and Bramah Systems; Dynamic AMM and Vault contracts audited by Neodyme; no critical vulnerabilities found.
Official documentation home with links to developer guide, API reference, and product overview.

unknowns: D6: No pool factory enumeration attempted — DLMM, DAMM v2, DBC are core programs generating pools permissionlessly; cap at 50 would apply if factory child enumeration were performed in future run.
D3: Audit PDF links not directly fetched; audit dates inferred from secondary sources only. Next run should fetch audit PDFs directly if URLs become available in protocol_metadata.

protocol_metadata.about: Meteora is a decentralized liquidity protocol built on Solana that provides dynamic liquidity pools for liquidity providers, launchpads, and token launches. Its core product, DLMM (Dynamic Liquidity Market Maker), uses bin-based concentrated liquidity with dynamic fees that adjust based on market volatility. The protocol also offers DAMM v2 (constant-product AMM), DAMM v1 (with integrated lending yield), and DBC (bonding curves for fair token launches).
